ItacPersonItem.Notes: The brother of Cornelio and Camillo. He was arrested in September 1560 in the context of the anti-heretical campaign that took place place in Siena, after the city surrendered to Cosimo de` Medici. See Ricco` 1989.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
